pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the local HVAC company, highlighting key services, promotions, and primary calls to action. Loads featured services, products, and offers to drive users into booking, product discovery, plans, specials, and content.
primary_functions: Provide quick access to core actions such as scheduling service, viewing specials, and exploring heating and cooling products.
Showcase main service categories (heating repair, AC repair, duct cleaning, indoor air quality, maintenance plans) with links to relevant detail or booking pages.
Display a prominent 'Schedule Service' button in the header that links to the unified booking page.
Offer a header search bar that lets users search for products like smart thermostats and navigates to the product listings/search results page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the primary 'Schedule Service' button in the hero or header.

params.query: User-entered term from the header search bar (e.g., 'smart thermostat')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the header search form.
Click on a featured 'Heating Systems' teaser card.
Click on a featured 'Cooling Systems' teaser card.
Click on a featured 'Thermostats' teaser card.
Click on a 'View All Special Offers' or promotions strip.
Click on a 'View Maintenance Plans' call-to-action.
Click on a featured article tile about indoor air quality.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Home' and via company logo link.
Users may land directly on the homepage via search engines, ads, or shared links.

pages.name: Schedule Service
pages.description: Unified booking page for standard services, installations, and promotional bookings, accessible from the header CTA, offers, and product pages. Handles AC repair, duct cleaning with offers, thermostat installations, and other standard bookings.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a service type (e.g., air_conditioning_repair, duct_cleaning, thermostat_installation) from a clearly labeled list or dropdown.
Collect location details such as ZIP code (and optional address fields) to validate service area.

Provide date pickers and time-slot selectors for choosing appointment windows (e.g., 9:00 AM  11:00 AM, 1:00 PM  4:00 PM), including the ability to select specific future dates like the nearest Saturday or exactly two weeks from today.
Offer a service level choice (Standard versus Emergency/After Hours) and enforce selection of 'Standard' where required by the task.
Support entry of contact information (name, phone, email, address when needed) and submission via 'Confirm Appointment' or 'Book Now' buttons.
Accept and carry through promotional context (e.g., from duct cleaning offers) so that eligible discounts are applied or noted on the booking confirmation.

incoming_params.description: Preselected service to book (e.g., 'air_conditioning_repair', 'duct_cleaning', 'thermostat_installation').
Optional product associated with an installation booking (e.g., smart thermostat ID).
Optional special offer to apply when booking (e.g., a duct cleaning promotion ID).
Logical booking type such as 'service', 'installation', or 'promotion_booking'.
Preselected service level, typically 'standard' for this page.

params.serviceId: Service selected in the service type list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View service details' link next to a service type.
Click on a 'Back to Home' link after completing or cancelling a booking.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Schedule Service' header link present on all pages.
Accessed with preselected service, product, or offer when linked from product, offer, or service detail pages.
Linked from homepage hero, service tiles, and promotions.
Re-rendered after partial form submissions (e.g., changing date/ZIP updates URL parameters).

pages.name: Product Listings
pages.description: Listing and search results page for HVAC products such as furnaces, air conditioners, and smart thermostats, with rich filtering and sorting. Supports category browsing from navigation and keyword search from the homepage/header.
primary_functions: Display products in a grid or list with key info (name, price, efficiency, rating, key features) based on category or search query (e.g., 'smart thermostat').
Provide category filters including options such as furnaces, air_conditioners, thermostats, and other heating or cooling equipment.
Offer efficiency filters (e.g., 95_percent_plus_afue or highest available AFUE ranges) for heating products like furnaces.
Include price filters with a maximum price field (e.g., allowing entry of 3500 or 250) and predefined ranges if desired.
Provide feature filters such as 'WiFi Enabled' or 'smart_connected' and rating filters such as '4_stars_and_up'.
Support sorting options like 'customer_rating_high_to_low' and 'price_low_to_high' to help users find highest-rated or most affordable options.
Link each product card to its product detail page (product.html?productId=123).

incoming_params.description: Product category key corresponding to ProductCategory.urlParamValue (e.g., 'heating_systems', 'cooling_systems', 'thermostats').
Free-text search query entered in the header or homepage search bar (e.g., 'smart thermostat').
Maximum product price filter (e.g., 3500 or 250) applied via on-page controls.
Identifier for an efficiency range (e.g., the ID representing '95%+ AFUE') selected in filters.
Selected feature tag filter such as 'wifi_enabled' or 'smart_connected'.
Minimum average customer rating filter (e.g., 4 for '4 stars & up').
Sort option key such as 'customer_rating_high_to_low' or 'price_low_to_high'.
Current page number for paginated product results.

params.categoryId: Current categoryId (if any) to support a 'back to results' breadcrumb.
params.query: Current search query (if any) to support a 'back to results' breadcrumb.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card or product name in the listings.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Heating Systems', 'Cooling Systems', or 'Thermostats' header links with categoryId pre-set.
Accessed directly with query and filter parameters for shareable search URLs.
Linked from homepage feature tiles or promotions that deep-link into a product category.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view for a single HVAC product such as a high-efficiency furnace or smart thermostat. Supports installation quote requests and direct installation scheduling.
primary_functions: Present detailed product information, including specifications, efficiency ratings (e.g., AFUE), features (such as WiFi connectivity), price, and customer ratings.
Show promotions or applicable discounts if available for the product.
Provide a 'Request Installation Quote' or 'Get a Quote' button that opens or scrolls to a quote request form on the page.
Offer a 'Schedule Installation' or 'Book Install' button that sends the user to the schedule_service.html page preloaded with the appropriate service type and product context.
Include an installation quote form that collects user details (name, address, city, ZIP, phone, email) and submits a quote request for products like high-efficiency furnaces.

incoming_params.description: Product ID for the item being viewed (e.g., a specific furnace or thermostat).
Optional originating category key used for 'Back to results' breadcrumbs.
Optional originating search query to preserve context when returning to listings.

params.serviceId: installationServiceId returned by getProductDetails for this product (e.g., 'thermostat_installation').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Schedule Installation' or 'Book Install' button.

params.categoryId: categoryId from the current URL (if present).
params.query: query from the current URL (if present).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to results' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to product.html with an 'id' parameter from product listings or featured products.
Linked from homepage featured products or promotional content.

pages.name: Maintenance Plans
pages.description: Overview page listing available HVAC maintenance plans and allowing users to find and compare options. Acts as the starting point for selecting an annual whole-home plan and proceeding to enrollment.
primary_functions: Display a list of maintenance plan options with key information such as included services, coverage (heating, cooling, or both), and annual pricing.
Provide coverage filters to show plans that cover 'Heating & Cooling' or 'whole_home_heating_cooling'.
Offer a billing term filter or dropdown to switch between monthly and annual options, allowing users to select 'annual' plans.
Support sorting by price (e.g., 'price_low_to_high') so the cheapest eligible plans appear first.
Allow users to click on a plan name or 'View Details' link to navigate to the maintenance plan detail page (plan_detail.html?planId=123).

incoming_params.description: Filter for maintenance plan coverage such as 'heating_cooling' or 'whole_home_heating_cooling'.
Selected billing term filter, typically 'annual' for yearly plans.
Identifier for a price-per-year range filter.
Sort option key such as 'price_low_to_high'.
Current page number when maintenance plans are paginated.

params.planId: ID of the selected maintenance plan.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a maintenance plan name or 'View Details' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Maintenance Plans' header navigation link.
Accessible from the 'Maintenance Plans' footer link.
Linked from homepage sections or promotional banners about maintenance savings.
Filters and sort selections are reflected into the URL as query parameters.

pages.name: Maintenance Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific maintenance plan, including coverage and enrollment. Enables adding an eligible plan to the online cart.
primary_functions: Show full details of the selected maintenance plan, including systems covered (heating and cooling), visit frequency, included checks, and annual pricing.
Highlight the billing term as annual and clearly display the yearly price so users can confirm it is at or under $200.
Provide a clear 'Add Plan to Cart' or 'Enroll Now' button to add the selected plan to the shopping cart.
Display any terms, limitations, or disclaimers related to the maintenance plan and link to policy information if needed.

incoming_params.description: ID of the maintenance plan to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add Plan to Cart' / 'Enroll Now', then choose to view the cart or follow a post-add prompt.
Click a 'Back to all plans' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via plan_detail.html with a 'planId' parameter from the maintenance plans list or homepage promotions.
May be linked directly from marketing campaigns promoting a specific plan.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page summarizing items selected for purchase, such as maintenance plans, prior to checkout.
primary_functions: List all items currently in the cart (e.g., selected maintenance plan) with name, price, and quantity if applicable.
Show an order summary including subtotals, taxes, and total price.
Allow users to remove items or update quantities if relevant.
Provide a 'Proceed to Checkout' button that sends users to the checkout page (checkout.html).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Proceed to Checkout' button.
Click 'Continue shopping' link for maintenance plans.

access_methods.description: Accessed via a cart icon or mini-cart link shown in the site header.
Remains the active page when users update quantities or remove items; the cart is refreshed via interfaces.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Secure checkout page for completing purchases such as annual maintenance plans. Captures billing and payment details and submits the order.
primary_functions: Collect customer billing and contact information (first name, last name, address, city, ZIP, email, phone).
Capture payment details (e.g., card number, expiration date, CVV) using sample or live values as appropriate.
Display a final order review including plan name, coverage, billing term, and total price before submission.
Provide a 'Place Order' or 'Complete Enrollment' button to finalize the purchase and confirm enrollment in the maintenance plan.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Return to Home' or similar link after a successful order confirmation message is displayed.

access_methods.description: Accessed from the 'Proceed to Checkout' button on the cart page.
The checkout form posts through placeOrder and then re-renders the same page with confirmation details.

pages.name: Special Offers
pages.description: Page listing current promotions, coupons, and special offers for services and products. Enables users to filter to duct cleaning and locate qualifying discounts for booking.
primary_functions: Display a list of available promotions with titles, brief descriptions, discount amounts or promotional prices, and expiration dates where applicable.
Provide category filters, including options like 'indoor_air_quality', 'duct_services', 'heating', and 'cooling', so users can focus on duct-related offers.
Clearly show discounts such as '15_percent_off' or promo prices (e.g., $250 or less) within each offer card.
Allow users to click an offer title or 'View Offer' link to access the detailed offer page (offer_detail.html?offerId=123).

incoming_params.description: Selected promotion category such as 'duct_services', 'indoor_air_quality', 'heating', or 'cooling'.
Filter for type of discount (e.g., 'percentage', 'fixed_price', 'amount_off').
Maximum promotional price filter (e.g., 250 to find duct cleaning offers at $250 or less).
Sort option for offers, such as by expiry date or discount size.
Current page number when offers are paginated.

params.offerId: ID of the selected special offer.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an offer title or 'View Offer' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Special Offers' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Special Offers' footer link.
Filtering options are encoded into the URL as query parameters for shareable and restorable views.
Linked from homepage promo banners and service detail pages promoting related offers.

pages.name: Offer Detail
pages.description: Detailed view for a specific promotion, such as a discounted duct cleaning service. Drives users directly into a booking flow with the offer attached.
primary_functions: Present full details of the selected offer, including exact discount (e.g., at least 15% off) or promotional price, applicable services (e.g., duct_cleaning), and any terms or restrictions.
Visually confirm that the promotion meets criteria like minimum discount or maximum price for the user.

Provide a clear call-to-action button such as 'Book This Service' or 'Schedule with Offer' that sends the user to the schedule_service.html page with the appropriate service and offer information preselected.
Explain how and when the discount will be applied to the booking (e.g., automatically at appointment confirmation).

incoming_params.description: ID of the special offer to display.

params.serviceId: Primary applicable Service.id from the offer (e.g., 'duct_cleaning').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Book This Service' or 'Schedule with Offer' call-to-action.
Click 'Back to all offers' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to offer_detail.html with an 'offerId' from the Special Offers page or a promo banner.
Linked from homepage featured promotions and email campaigns.

pages.name: Service Detail
pages.description: Service information page for specific offerings such as Heating Repair, Duct Cleaning, or Indoor Air Quality services. Supports standard scheduling via the unified booking page as well as inline emergency and consultation requests.
primary_functions: Provide detailed descriptions, benefits, and basic pricing guidance for the specific service (e.g., heating_repair, duct_cleaning, air_purifier_installation).
Offer a standard booking option (e.g., 'Schedule Service') that links to schedule_service.html with the service type preselected.

Include an 'Emergency Service' tab, toggle, or section for relevant services like heating_repair, exposing an emergency request form with ZIP, date, late-evening time-slot options (e.g., 8:00 PM onward), problem description, contact info, and a 'Submit Emergency Request' button.

Provide a 'Request Consultation' or 'Schedule a Consultation' section for indoor air quality services, including a date picker (limit to weekdays within the next 7 days), an afternoon time-of-day dropdown, and fields for name, phone, email, and a message.
Ensure that calls to action from blog articles (e.g., 'Learn about air purifier installation') land on the appropriate service view within this page.

incoming_params.description: Service identifier (e.g., 'heating_repair', 'duct_cleaning', 'air_purifier_installation') to display.
Optional view mode, such as 'standard', 'emergency', or 'consultation', used to open the relevant tab by default.
Optional ID of a recently created booking, used to fetch and display confirmation details via getBookingDetails.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a standard 'Schedule Service' button (non-emergency) on the service detail page.

params.category: Mapped category for the current service (e.g., 'duct_services' or 'heating').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View related offers' link in the service sidebar or content.

params.articleId: ID of a related blog article selected from the related content list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a related article title from the 'Learn more' section.

access_methods.description: The 'Heating Repair' header navigation entry links to service_detail.html?serviceId=heating_repair.
Accessed via service_detail.html with a 'serviceId' from blog articles, offers, or other internal links.
Linked from homepage service tiles, internal CTAs, and search results.
Remains active after inline emergency or consultation booking submissions, updating with confirmation data.

pages.name: Financing Overview
pages.description: Overview of available financing and payment options for new HVAC equipment and major projects. Lets users identify 0% APR plans for specific terms.
primary_functions: List available financing plans with key highlights such as term length, APR (including 0_percent_apr plans), and example monthly payments.
Allow users to scan for specific offers like a 12_month_0_percent_apr plan for new systems.
Provide 'Learn More' or plan name links for each financing option to navigate to the detailed financing plan page (financing_plan.html?planId=123).
Offer basic guidance on what purchases financing can be used for (e.g., new air conditioners, full HVAC systems).

incoming_params.description: Optional flag (e.g., 'true') to filter the list to 0% APR plans only.
Minimum plan term in months (e.g., 12) when filtering financing options.
Sort option for financing plans (e.g., by APR or term length).

params.financingPlanId: ID of the financing plan selected from the list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a financing plan name or 'Learn More' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Financing' header navigation link.
Accessible from the 'Financing' footer link.
Filters may be reflected in the URL for direct links to 0% APR or specific term ranges.

pages.name: Financing Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific financing plan, including terms and an application form. Used to start applications such as a 12-month 0% APR plan for a new air conditioner.
primary_functions: Display full terms of the selected financing plan, including APR, duration (e.g., 12 months), eligibility requirements, and example payment scenarios.
Provide a 'Start Application' or 'Apply Now' button that reveals or scrolls to the application form on the same page.

Include an application form that collects purchase amount (e.g., 5000), purpose or product type (e.g., new_air_conditioner or new_hvac_system), personal details (name, address, city, ZIP, phone, email), and optional last 4 digits of SSN.
Offer a preferred contact method dropdown (e.g., email, phone) and a 'Submit Financing Request' or 'Continue Application' button to initiate the financing process.

incoming_params.description: ID of the financing plan whose details and application form should be shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to financing options' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to financing_plan.html with a 'financingPlanId' query parameter.
Linked from promotions or from product/checkout pages suggesting financing options.
Remains on the page after financing application submission, showing confirmation and next steps.

pages.name: Blog / Resources
pages.description: Blog and resource center with educational articles on HVAC topics, including indoor air quality. Supports searching articles and filtering by topic tags.
primary_functions: List blog posts with titles, excerpts, dates, and tags (e.g., indoor_air_quality, heating, cooling, maintenance).
Provide a search field and/or category filters so users can search specifically for 'indoor air quality' content.
Allow users to click a post title to navigate to the article detail page (article.html?articleId=456).
Highlight featured or popular articles that address common homeowner questions about comfort and efficiency.

incoming_params.description: Search term for filtering articles (e.g., 'indoor air quality').
Article tag filter such as 'indoor_air_quality', 'heating', 'cooling', or 'maintenance'.
Sort option (e.g., by newest, relevance, or popularity).
Current page number for paginated articles.

params.articleId: ID of the clicked blog article.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a blog post title or 'Read more' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Blog' header navigation link.
Accessible from the 'Blog' footer link.
Search and filter state is reflected in URL query parameters.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content page for a single blog article, with contextual links into relevant services for booking or consultation requests.
primary_functions: Display the complete article content including headings, images, and body text.
Highlight specific recommended services within the article (e.g., air_purifier_installation, uv_air_cleaner, air_filtration_upgrade).
Provide embedded links or buttons such as 'Learn about air purifier installation' that navigate to the relevant service detail page (service_detail.html?serviceId=air_purifier_installation).
Offer navigation to related articles or back to the blog listing page to continue learning.

incoming_params.description: ID of the blog article to display.

params.serviceId: Service.id from a recommended service within this article (e.g., 'air_purifier_installation').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an embedded call-to-action like 'Learn about air purifier installation' or 'Request indoor air quality consultation'.
Click 'Back to blog' or a similar navigation link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via article.html with an 'articleId' parameter from the blog listing or featured article links.
Linked directly from homepage or other promotional content featuring specific articles.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Company background page establishing trust, service areas, and experience. Provides reassurance and directs users to contact or schedule service.
primary_functions: Share company history, certifications, licenses, service area coverage (e.g., neighborhoods around Atlanta), and team information.
Reassure visitors with trust signals such as reviews, affiliations, and guarantees.
Provide clear links to 'Contact' and 'Schedule Service' for users who wish to reach out or book immediately.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Contact Us' button or link.
Click on a 'Schedule Service' call-to-action from the About page.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'About Us' link in the site footer.
Users may land here from search engines or external references about the company.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and general inquiry page. Provides direct contact details, a general inquiry form, and service area context.
primary_functions: Display primary contact details including phone number, email address, physical address, and service hours.
Provide a simple contact form where users can submit general questions or non-urgent service inquiries.
Offer quick links or buttons to 'Schedule Service', 'Maintenance Plans', and 'Special Offers' for users who decide to take direct action.

incoming_params.description: Optional prefilled subject for the contact form (e.g., 'Question about maintenance plans').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Schedule Service' quick-link button.
Click on a 'View Maintenance Plans' quick-link.
Click on a 'View Special Offers' quick-link.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Contact' footer link.
Users may land here from external listings or directories linking to the company's contact page.
The contact form submits via submitContactMessage and re-renders with a success message.

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Policy page combining privacy, terms of use, and service disclaimers. Provides legal and compliance information related to the website, bookings, offers, and orders.
primary_functions: Present the website's privacy policy, including how user data from forms (appointments, quotes, financing) is handled.
Outline terms of use for the website and any limitations of liability.
Include disclaimers regarding emergency response times, appointment windows, and promotional offer conditions.

incoming_params.description: Optional anchor or section identifier (e.g., 'privacy', 'terms', 'disclaimers') to scroll to a specific part of the policies.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Policies' link in the site footer.
Specific sections may be linked via a 'section' query parameter.

header_links.description: Homepage with primary services, promotions, and calls to action
Furnaces and other heating equipment with efficiency and price filters
Annual and seasonal HVAC maintenance plan options
Coupons and promotions including duct cleaning discounts
Heating and furnace repair service with emergency request option
Financing and payment plans for new equipment
HVAC tips, resources, and indoor air quality articles
Unified booking page for repairs, installations, and duct cleaning

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company, team, and service area
Contact information and general inquiry form
Overview of HVAC maintenance plan options
Available financing plans and application details
Privacy, terms of use, and service disclaimers
